info.title: Content Service
info.description:
This API exposes endpoints for content service

**Authentication:**
- **Read endpoints** (GET /content/api/**): require the `X-API-Key` header only.
- **Write endpoints** (POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE /content/api/**): require both the `X-API-Key` header and a JWT Bearer token.

tags.name: Content Translation API
tags.description: Multilingual translations for any Inuk content type (POST, PHOTO, VIDEO, AUDIO, STORY, ARTICLE, ALBUM). Each translation stores the localised title, body, and SEO metadata for a specific language (ISO 639-1 code). Slugs are auto-generated using language-appropriate rules and support transliteration for Indic scripts. The resolve endpoint enables SEO routing using language-specific or romanized slugs. Translations have independent publish/unpublish lifecycle separate from the base content item.

tags.name: Stats API
tags.description: Track and query aggregated interaction counts for content items on the Inuk platform. Each stat record holds the count for one interaction type (LIKE, VIEW, COMMENT, SHARE, FAVORITE, SAVE, FLAG, REPORT) on a specific content item (post, photo, video, etc.). The combination of contentId + contentType + statType is unique — the upsert endpoint creates or returns the existing record.

tags.name: Badge API
tags.description: Achievement badge definitions and their evaluation rules for the Inuk platform. Badges are visual markers awarded to users or content when configurable criteria are met (e.g. First Post, 100 Likes, Top Creator of the Week). Each badge can have one or more BadgeRules that the awards engine evaluates automatically. Use the Badge Assignment API to manually assign or query badge awards on specific content or profiles.

tags.name: Video API
tags.description: Video content captured and shared by Inuk platform creators. Each video record links to a media asset that passes through the upload pipeline (UPLOADED → PROCESSING → READY) and carries streaming URLs, resolution, codec, and duration metadata. Includes an update-by-media-id endpoint so the transcoding pipeline can enrich video metadata after processing completes.

tags.name: Feed API
tags.description: Ranked content discovery feed for the Inuk platform. Returns published content ordered by overall popularity score — a composite of likes, comments, shares, views, and recency. Each entry is a ContentCard that bundles static content metadata with live engagement stats for efficient feed-card rendering. Filter by content type (POST, PHOTO, VIDEO, AUDIO, STORY, ARTICLE, ALBUM) to power type-specific discovery tabs.

tags.name: Badge Assignment API
tags.description: Records of badge awards on the Inuk platform. A badge assignment links a badge definition to a specific content item or profile, capturing when and why the badge was earned. Assignments can be created automatically by the rule-evaluation engine or manually by platform operators. Use the by-content and by-profile endpoints to display badge ribbons on content cards and profile pages.

tags.name: Leaderboard API
tags.description: Top-ranked content leaderboards for the Inuk platform. Returns content items sorted by composite popularity score for a given content type, scope (GLOBAL, REGIONAL, CATEGORY), and time period (DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, OVERALL). Each leaderboard entry includes the rank position alongside enriched content details and live engagement stats — suitable for 'Top Photos This Week' display features. Rankings are computed periodically by the ranking engine.

tags.name: Weather API
tags.description: Weather condition metadata captured at the time and location of content creation. Weather records store temperature, humidity, wind speed and direction, cloud cover, UV index, visibility, and a weather-condition code. Linking weather context to photos, videos, and stories helps Inuk creators provide richer environmental storytelling for outdoor and nature content.

tags.name: Album API
tags.description: Albums let creators group multiple media items (photos, videos, audio) into a single curated, shareable collection — ideal for events, trips, or themed series. Each album maintains an ordered media list with a cover image reference. Supports full lifecycle management, slug-based routing, and individual media-item add/remove operations.

tags.name: Workflow API
tags.description: Content moderation and editorial workflow management. Workflows define the lifecycle stages that content passes through before publishing (e.g. draft → review → approved → published). Platform operators configure custom moderation pipelines per content type and tenant, controlling what review steps are required and who can advance content through each stage.

tags.name: Credit API
tags.description: Content attribution credits for the Inuk platform. Credits link a contributing profile to a content item with an optional role (e.g. PHOTOGRAPHER, EDITOR, LOCATION_SCOUT). Multiple credits can be attached to a single item, enabling proper attribution for collaborative or commissioned content. Credits are displayed alongside content metadata.

tags.name: Flag API
tags.description: Lightweight one-click content flags that signal a content item needs moderator attention. Unlike formal complaints, flags carry no reason code — they are a volume signal. Flag counts accumulate per content item and can automatically trigger moderation reviews when configurable thresholds are exceeded. Each authenticated profile can flag a given content item exactly once.

tags.name: Media API
tags.description: Raw media asset management — the foundation layer for all content uploads on the Inuk platform. A Media record tracks the binary asset in S3 (file name, extension, bucket, key, size, upload status, visibility) before it is enriched as a Photo, Video, or Audio. Includes endpoints to register a new asset, confirm an S3 upload, attach EXIF data, update location tags, and store a BlurHash for low-quality image previews (LQIP).

tags.name: Complaint Reason API
tags.description: Platform-configured catalog of selectable reasons shown to users when filing a content complaint (e.g. Hate Speech, Spam, Nudity, Misinformation). Each reason has a unique code, a localised display label, an active/inactive toggle, and a display order. Use the /active endpoint to populate the report picker in client UIs; the full list (including inactive) is accessible to platform administrators only.

tags.name: Tag API
tags.description: Manage free-form tags used to label content on the Inuk platform. Tags (e.g. 'varanasi', 'golden-hour', 'street-food') improve content discoverability and power hashtag-style browsing. Each tag title must be unique within the tenant. Supports slug-based lookup and bulk CSV upload.

tags.name: Quiz API
tags.description: Interactive quizzes for the Inuk platform. A quiz contains one or more multiple-choice questions with correct answers. Users submit attempts and receive an automatic score. Quizzes can be used as standalone engagement features or embedded within a Quiz Contest for competitive time-limited scoring. Supports full CRUD for quizzes, questions, and answer options.

tags.name: Location API
tags.description: Manage geographic location records on the Inuk platform. Locations capture the full Indian administrative hierarchy (state → district → block/taluk → city/village) plus GPS coordinates. Locations are attached to photos, videos, and posts. Supports proximity-based nearby search using lat/lng and radius.

tags.name: Category API
tags.description: Manage content categories and their hierarchies on the Inuk platform. Categories organise posts, photos and videos into browsable topic areas (e.g. Travel, Wildlife Photography). Supports self-referencing parent-child hierarchy, slug-based lookup, and bulk CSV upload.

tags.name: Complaint API
tags.description: Formal content violation reports submitted by Inuk users. Each complaint references a reason code (from the Complaint Reason catalog) and enters a PENDING moderation queue. Platform moderators review and advance complaints through PENDING → REVIEWED → ACTIONED/DISMISSED states. Complaint counts are not surfaced to content creators to avoid gaming.

tags.name: Activity Log API
tags.description: Read-only audit trail of user interactions on the Inuk platform. Activity log entries are written automatically by service-layer operations whenever a significant action occurs (LIKE, UNLIKE, COMMENT, SHARE, VIEW, FLAG, FAVORITE). Entries are immutable — this API provides query access only. Use the entity and profile endpoints to retrieve the interaction history for a specific content item or user profile.

tags.name: Article API
tags.description: Long-form editorial articles composed of a header and ordered sections (text, images, embeds). Articles carry reading-time estimates, categories, tags, and cover images. Supports slug-based routing for SEO-friendly URLs, a dedicated detail endpoint that returns the article with all sections, and section-level create/update/delete for incremental editing workflows.

tags.name: Share API
tags.description: Content share records for the Inuk platform. A share is recorded whenever a user distributes content to an external channel or another user (e.g. copy link, WhatsApp, Twitter). Each share increments the SHARE stat counter on the content item and contributes to the engagement ranking score. Share channel is tracked for analytics. Supports full lifecycle management and search.

tags.name: Ranking API
tags.description: Content popularity rankings for the Inuk platform. Each ranking record stores the computed score and rank position for a content item across a given scope (GLOBAL, REGIONAL, CATEGORY) and time period (DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, OVERALL). Rankings are computed periodically by the scoring engine — this API provides read and management access. Use the history endpoint to retrieve past ranking snapshots for trend analysis and analytics.

tags.name: Favorite API
tags.description: Content favorites (bookmarks) that let Inuk users save content for quick retrieval. Each authenticated profile can favorite a given content item exactly once — duplicates are rejected. The FAVORITE stat counter is tracked atomically and contributes to content engagement scores.

tags.name: Story API
tags.description: Ephemeral visual narratives created by Inuk platform users. Stories are short-lived content pieces with an optional expiry time that transitions through publish lifecycle states (DRAFT → PUBLISHED → EXPIRED). They carry a cover image, location, and engagement stats. Supports slug-based routing for SEO-friendly public story pages.

tags.name: Quiz Contest API
tags.description: Competitive quiz events for the Inuk platform. A quiz contest wraps a quiz in a time-bounded competition — participants answer questions within a fixed window and are scored on both correctness and speed. Rankings are computed automatically on contest close and can feed into the platform leaderboard. Supports full lifecycle management from creation through to result publication.

tags.name: Contest API
tags.description: Time-bounded content competitions on the Inuk platform. Contests define eligibility rules, open/close submission windows, prize tiers, and judging criteria. Users submit content entries within the contest window; results and winner announcements are published via the contest-result endpoints. Supports full lifecycle management from draft creation through to result publication.

tags.name: Photo API
tags.description: Individual photo records uploaded by Inuk platform creators. Photos are the platform's most-used content type and carry visual metadata, EXIF reference, location tags, captions, and live engagement statistics (likes, views, comments, shares). Each photo is linked to an S3 media asset and gets an auto-generated slug for SEO-friendly routing. Language is auto-detected from the Accept-Language header on create.

tags.name: Reward API
tags.description: Sparks reward economy for the Inuk platform. Users earn Sparks by creating content, receiving engagement (likes, comments, shares), winning contests, and completing quiz challenges. This API exposes each user's current Sparks balance, lifetime earnings, reputation score, level tier, and paginated transaction history. Balance mutations are performed internally by the rule engine — the API is read-only for consumers.

tags.name: Reward Rule API
tags.description: Configurable rules that drive the Inuk Sparks economy. Each rule defines a trigger action (e.g. POST_CREATED, LIKE_RECEIVED, CONTEST_WON), the Sparks amount awarded, optional per-day and total caps, and an active/inactive toggle. The reward engine evaluates all active rules automatically when platform events occur. Deactivate a rule to pause it without deleting it; reactivate to resume. Rule changes take effect immediately for subsequent events.

tags.name: Comment API
tags.description: Threaded comments on any Inuk content item (post, photo, video, audio, story, article). Supports one level of nesting: top-level comments on a content item and replies to those comments via parentCommentId. The COMMENT stat counter on the target content is incremented/decremented atomically on create/delete. Use the replies endpoint to paginate replies to a specific comment.

tags.name: Workflow Execution API
tags.description: Active workflow execution instances for content items. A workflow execution tracks the current moderation stage of a specific content item as it moves through the configured workflow pipeline (e.g. draft → review → approved → published). Stores the current step, reviewer assignments, and allows advancing or rejecting content through the pipeline.

tags.name: Audio API
tags.description: Audio content (podcasts, music tracks, voice notes, soundscapes) created by Inuk platform users. Each audio record links to an uploaded media asset and carries playback metadata: duration, bitrate, codec, sample rate, language, and optional transcript. Includes an update-by-media-id endpoint for post-upload enrichment triggered by the media processing pipeline.

tags.name: EXIF API
tags.description: EXIF (Exchangeable Image File Format) metadata extracted from photo uploads. Each EXIF record is linked 1:1 with a parent Photo record and stores technical camera parameters: aperture (f-stop), shutter speed, ISO, focal length, GPS coordinates, flash mode, white balance, and camera make/model. Useful for displaying camera information alongside photos in the Inuk creator profile.

tags.name: Like API
tags.description: Content likes — the primary positive engagement signal on the Inuk platform. Each authenticated profile can like a given content item exactly once; duplicates are rejected. Like counts are tracked atomically in the Stats system and feed directly into the content ranking and feed algorithms.

tags.name: Post Media API
tags.description: Manages the ordered list of media items (photos, videos, audio) attached to a post. A PostMedia record defines the sequence position (mediaOrder) and content type of each attached asset, enabling posts to behave as a carousel or reel. Also exposes an enriched detail endpoint that returns all media items for a post with full asset details (S3 key, file name, size, upload status) for client rendering.

tags.name: Post API
tags.description: User-generated posts — the primary social content type on the Inuk platform. Posts support text content with optional media attachments, category and tag classification, slug-based routing, full-text search, and engagement stats (likes, comments, shares, favorites). New posts enter a configurable moderation workflow and are surfaced in the ranked content feed once published.
